sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Dallas Signature Sale 3126, Lot 31045 — Ancients
Diocletian (AD 284-305). AV aureus (18mm, 5.52 gm, 6h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5, light marks. Rome. DIOCLETI-ANVS PF AVG, laureate head of Diocletian right / IOVI CO-NSER-VAT AVGG, Jupiter st
sales.description:
Ancients
Diocletian (AD 284-305). AV aureus (18mm, 5.52 gm, 6h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5, light marks. Rome. DIOCLETI-ANVS PF AVG, laureate head of Diocletian right / IOVI CO-NSER-VAT AVGG, Jupiter standing facing, head left, thunderbolt in outstretched right hand, grounded scepter in left; PROM in exergue. Calicó 4473. RIC-. Bold, reflective reliefs on centered dies. 

Ex Harlan J. Berk, private sale with old dealer's tag included. 

When Diocletian came into power, he realized that the empir...
